verification_criteria: Build Success (20 points) - code must compile with ./gradlew compileDebugKotlin
Menu XML with SearchView (20 points) - file must exist with action_search ID and androidx.appcompat.widget.SearchView
Adapter filtering logic (30 points) - must contain filter/contains/lowercase keywords and notifyDataSetChanged/submitList
Activity query listener setup (30 points) - must have onCreateOptionsMenu, setOnQueryTextListener, and onQueryTextChange

privileged_info_summary: The task is to implement search functionality in a synthetic Android Employee Directory app using Kotlin and AndroidX. The project is set up at /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/EmployeeDirectory with package com.example.employeedirectory. The app displays 10 hardcoded synthetic employee records in a RecyclerView and targets Android API 34 (min API 24). Three files must be created/modified: (1) app/src/main/res/menu/main_menu.xml with a SearchView action item, (2) app/src/main/java/com/example/employeedirectory/EmployeeAdapter.kt with filtering logic that updates the displayed list based on query text (case-insensitive name matching), and (3) app/src/main/java/com/example/employeedirectory/MainActivity.kt with onCreateOptionsMenu override and OnQueryTextListener to wire the SearchView. Successful completion requires all code to compile via Gradle and verification checks for: build success, correct menu XML with SearchView, adapter filtering implementation (filter/contains logic with notifyDataSetChanged), and activity listener setup (onQueryTextChange handler).
